name: Living Room
description: You are in a living room that looks staged for occupancy rather than actual living. A doorway leads east, while a wooden door to the west, carved with ornate gothic lettering, has been decisively nailed shut. A trophy case stands against one wall, empty but expectant, and a large oriental rug occupies the center of the room with unnecessary confidence. Above the trophy case hangs an elvish sword of considerable age, displayed more like a credential than a weapon. A battery-powered brass lantern rests on the case, apparently included as a courtesy.
